violations.text: The 2 door reach-in was observed turned off and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in 2 door reach-in until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 2-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2026
Establishment is lacking proper drain plugs for the 2-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain drain plugs. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelving has an accumulation of dust, dirt and black residue. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025
